title: selaginella nivea subsp. nivea
intro: Selaginella nivea subsp. nivea, also known as Snow Fern or White Cliff Club Moss, is a species of spore-producing plant in the family Selaginellaceae. The medicinal properties of Selaginella nivea subsp. nivea include its ability to stimulate the immune system, reduce inflammation, and exhibit antioxidant properties. The health benefits of this plant include its potential to reduce oxidative stress, improve respiratory health, and support the body's natural defense against infection. Traditionally, the plant is prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or tinctures, which are consumed to harness its medicinal properties.
